query: query Conversations($limit: Int, $page: Int, $agentId: ID, $status: ConversationStatusEnum) { conversations(limit: $limit, page: $page, agentId: $agentId, status: $status) { data { _id channel agent { _id personalInfo { name } } metadata { status totalMessages reactions { like dislike neutral } } createdAt } metaData { page limit totalPages totalDocuments } } }
